name: Maple Crepes
recipeInstructions:
Crepes: Mix all ingredients in blender; let stand 20 minutes. Pour 1/4 to 1/3 cup batter in hot crepe pan, brown on both sides and pile on top of each other. Yields 18 crepes.
Maple Butter: Cut butter into cubes; blend with syrup and extract. Whip until light; melt butter and coat crepes with butter. Roll crepes up, sprinkle with confectioners sugar and serve with extra warm maple butter.
